name: The Yonkyu Co.,Ltd.
summary: The Yonkyu Co.,Ltd. operates in the fishery industry in Japan. The company is involved in stocking, processing, and selling fresh fishes, living preys, blended feed, and moist pellets. It also involved in artificial hatching; and tuna and eel farming businesses. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Uwajima, Japan.
